title: AgentRegistration
description: Registration payload sent by an Agent when connecting to the Runtime. Contains identity and declared Capabilities.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this document. Follows Semantic Versioning.

name.description: Human-readable Agent name for logging and admin interfaces.

agent_id.description: If provided, re-registration of existing Agent. If omitted, Runtime assigns one.

endpoint.description: Network address for Task dispatch. Required for network-based Agents.

protocol_version.description: Runtime API version the Agent supports.

heartbeat_interval_ms.description: Suggested heartbeat interval. Runtime may override.
